text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking about the academy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Out of my waaaay!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Phew! Thank goodness I didn't crash into you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry to startle you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My fortune this morning said I'd have good luck if
I gave my all to everything I did today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm using my lucky dash to get around,
and why I ate my lucky lunch during class!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And when I got caught, I pulled out my lucky
groveling to ask for forgiveness!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This overwhelming feeling of elation must be the
sensation of my body getting filled with good
fortune!
choice_data_list: It's probably just from you rushing everything...

Why don't you try being a little more
enthusiastic?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk! I swear I'm not being impatient! It's more
than that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm not, but... Nnngh... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You're right. I'll try to take things more seriously.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll start by holding this pen with so much force
that it begins shaking...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...and activate every granule of my fortune-telling
wisdom in order to fill my upcoming quiz with
runes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her drive to give a hundred percent in everything
is great, but I get the feeling that she has extra
classes on the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's this?! Are you're saying I'm still not
applying myself enthusiastically enough?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then I'll warm myself up with some crazy
mystical posing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to start doing it while I head on over to
the training track.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Lemon peel, orange wheel, upside-down purple
seal... One, two, threeee!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Gah! What the heck is she doing?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, the Colorful Seal Warm-Up Routine
becomes an underground hit among the
Umamusume.
